Hero.sub2: Building beautiful, fast, and intuitive digital experiences.

About.heading: About Me
About.bio1: A Web Developer & Designer based in Japan, passionate about crafting interfaces that feel great to use.
About.bio2: Primarily focused on front-end development, I cover the full stack from back-end to design. I specialize in animation with GSAP and Framer Motion, building products that balance performance and UX.

items.desc: Working as a freelancer centered on web development, delivering high-quality products with a modern tech stack.
Worked on front-end development at a startup, responsible for designing and implementing SPAs with React/Next.js.
Majored in software development, algorithms, and database design.

projects.desc: An interactive portfolio site built with GSAP. ScrollTrigger creates an immersive browsing experience.
A real-time synchronized task management app designed to dramatically improve team workflow efficiency.
An e-commerce site integrated with Stripe. Performance optimization achieved green scores on all Core Web Vitals.
